tasks.title: Define 4 audience personas
tasks.description: Document The Sovereign Builder, The Pragmatic Dev, The MENA Pioneer, and The AI Director. Each persona needs: role, region, pain points, AIWF use case, preferred content format. Ground each in real signals from .ai/logs/workflow.jsonl and community knowledge.

tasks.title: Audit existing AIWF content assets
tasks.description: Scan docs/, .ai/dashboard/, README.md, and any public-facing content. Score each against SEO ≥85, readability ≥65, brand voice ≥92. Produce asset inventory table in domain_model.md.

tasks.title: Map 3 competitor content strategies
tasks.description: Analyse LangChain, CrewAI, and AutoGen content strategies. Extract: primary channel, tone, posting cadence, differentiation angle. Add competitor matrix to domain_model.md. Extract AIWF counter-positioning.

tasks.title: Define SMART content objectives + channel matrix
tasks.description: Set 4 SMART objectives tied to v21 launch goals (developer awareness, MENA positioning, thought leadership, technical credibility). Build channel priority matrix: GitHub P1, LinkedIn P2, X P2, Dev.to P3, Arabic MENA P3.

tasks.title: Law 151/2020 compliance check
tasks.description: Complete regional_compliance.md. Verify all persona data is anonymised and stored in-region. Confirm Arabic content scope decision (English-first, Arabic-adapted). No personal data of Egyptian subjects may leave Egypt.

tasks.title: Spec density gate validation
tasks.description: Run spec_density_gate_v2.py --phase .ai/plan/content/phase-01-discovery --write-report. Must return 6/6 gates PASS before Phase 02 activates.
